name: max_rear_end_a4
description: Vollkasko driver rear-ended on the A4 near Köln-Ost in heavy rain. No injuries, other party admitted fault, police came. Showcases Tavily weather lookup + clean pillar progression.
caller_turns: Hi, no — no one's hurt, thankfully. But my car was rear-ended.
It was about 30 minutes ago, on the A4 heading east, just past the Köln-Ost exit. Pouring rain, basically a brake-check accident.
The other guy admitted it was his fault at the scene. He had a BMW, plate K-AB 1234. He said he's with HUK-Coburg.
Yeah, the police came. The case number is — let me find it — 2026-04-25-7711.
Honestly the bumper is dented but I think I can drive it home. Should I drop it at a workshop?
